title: Senior Business Development Manager at Tata Housing Consulting Pvt Ltd

jsonLd.title: Senior Business Development Manager at Tata Housing Consulting Pvt Ltd
jsonLd.description:
We at Tata Housing Consulting Pvt Ltd are looking for an experienced Business Development Manager based out of Amritsar. If you are a result-oriented professional with a passion for excellence, we want to hear from you.

About Tata Housing Consulting Pvt Ltd:
Tata Housing Consulting Pvt Ltd is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Conduct market research and provide competitive analysis
• Manage RERA documentation and compliance requirements
• Maintain a pipeline of qualified leads using CRM software
• Negotiate pricing, terms, and conditions on behalf of clients
• Coordinate with legal teams for documentation and title verification
• Liaise with banks and NBFCs for home loan assistance to customers
• Coordinate with architects, contractors, and project teams

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• CA / CMA / CFA certification
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Property Valuation
• Proficiency in MS Office
• Proficiency in GIS Tools
• Proficiency in Property Management
• Proficiency in Client Relationship Management
• Proficiency in Investment Analysis
• Proficiency in Sales Techniques
• Proficiency in Project Management

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Flexible working hours
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Amritsar, Punjab, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Tata Housing Consulting Pvt Ltd!
